text.message: I’m in last ur not getting two cards
Are u serious lmao. Red has double port and black has city and wheat port
Guys watch out I’m coming for you
Yeah stop trying to make people think you are perpetually in last
I mean I am gonna lose road soon and I have no other space so what do u think my path is to winning
With my one sheep and one wheat spot
lol, aggression and insults when challenged on not being in last. Great look
Did u read what I said or nah
U j don’t want to admit it
As if citying with one wheat spot is so easy
Like u legit ab to take road lmao
